Class RobotController

java.lang.Object
edu.desu.cis.robot.control.RobotController
All Implemented Interfaces:
AutoCloseable
Direct Known Subclasses:
MazeRobot
public abstract class RobotController extends Object implements AutoCloseable
An abstract controller for a robot, providing core functionalities for discovery, connection, and teardown. This class is intended to be subclassed by specific robot controller implementations that define the robot's behavior.

  • Field Summary

    Field
    Description
    protected final MBot2
    mbot
    The MBot2 instance for sending commands to the robot.

  • Field Details

    • mbot

      protected final MBot2 mbot
      The MBot2 instance for sending commands to the robot.

  • Constructor Details

    • RobotController

      public RobotController(String robotName)
      Constructs a new RobotController. This constructor handles robot discovery, establishes a connection, and sets up telemetry. A shutdown hook is also registered to ensure resources are released on JVM termination.

  • Method Details

    • close

      public void close()
      Closes the connection to the robot and releases all associated resources. This method is synchronized and idempotent.
      Specified by:
      close in interface AutoCloseable

    • awaitNewData

      protected SensorSnapshot awaitNewData()
      A blocking method that waits until new sensor data is available. This is useful for synchronizing robot actions with sensor updates.

    • run

      public abstract void run()
      The main logic loop for the robot's behavior. Subclasses must implement this method to define the robot's specific tasks and actions.
